title: muntingiaceae
intro: The Muntingiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a small family of flowering plants that are native to the Americas and Africa. It contains about 10-15 species, and is characterized by its unique characteristics such as its small, often shrubby habit and its small, white or yellow flowers. Muntingiaceae plants are typically found in dry or rocky areas, and are often adapted to withstand harsh environmental conditions. This family is relatively small and not well-studied, but it is of interest to botanists due to its unique evolutionary history and adaptations.
